ddls:
CREATE TABLE "songs" (
  "song_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each song */,
  "billboard_track" TEXT /* Billboard track name */,
  "spotify_track" TEXT /* Spotify track name */,
  "billboard_artist" TEXT /* Billboard artist name */,
  "spotify_artist" TEXT /* Spotify artist name */,
  "spotify_id" TEXT /* Spotify song ID */,
  "title" TEXT /* Standardized title for the song */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the song in seconds */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the song was released */,
  "explicit_content" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the song contains explicit content */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the song data (e.g., Billboard, Spotify) */,
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the album table */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("song_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_songs_album_id FOREIGN KEY ("album_id") REFERENCES albums ("album_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "artists" (
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each artist */,
  "name" TEXT /* Artist name */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Artist genre */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the artist */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the artist */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the artist's image */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON array of social media links */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the artist record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("artist_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audio_features" (
  "feature_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audio feature */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the feature belongs to */,
  "danceability" REAL /* Danceability of the song */,
  "energy" REAL /* Energy of the song */,
  "key" INTEGER /* Key of the song */,
  "loudness" REAL /* Loudness of the song */,
  "mode" INTEGER /* Mode of the song */,
  "speechiness" REAL /* Speechiness of the song */,
  "acousticness" REAL /* Acousticness of the song */,
  "instrumentalness" REAL /* Instrumentalness of the song */,
  "liveness" REAL /* Liveness of the song */,
  "valence" REAL /* Valence of the song */,
  "tempo" REAL /* Tempo of the song */,
  "tempo_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the tempo feature */,
  "key_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the key feature */,
  "mode_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the mode feature */,
  "time_signature" INTEGER /* Time signature of the song */,
  "time_signature_confidence" REAL /* Confidence level of the time signature feature */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio features were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the audio features were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feature_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audio_features_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "charts" (
  "chart_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each chart performance */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the chart performance belongs to */,
  "billboard_chart" TEXT /* Billboard chart name */,
  "spotify_chart" TEXT /* Spotify chart name */,
  "chart_date" TEXT /* Date of the chart */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Position of the song in the chart */,
  "chart_type" TEXT /* Type of chart (e.g., weekly, monthly) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart performance was recorded */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the chart performance was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("chart_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_charts_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lyrics" (
  "lyric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lyric */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the lyric belongs to */,
  "lyric_text" TEXT /* Lyric text */,
  "lyricist" TEXT /* Name of the lyricist */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the lyrics */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lyrics were created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the lyrics were last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lyric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lyrics_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role (e.g. analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "song_matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the match belongs to */,
  "match_score" REAL /* Match score between Billboard and Spotify */,
  "match_type" TEXT /* Type of match (e.g., exact, partial) */,
  "match_algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for matching */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the match was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_song_matches_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each result */,
  "song_id" INTEGER /* ID of the song the result belongs to */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., sentiment, genre) */,
  "result_text" TEXT /* Result text */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "algorithm_used" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the analysis */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the analysis result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis result was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_song_id FOREIGN KEY ("song_id") REFERENCES songs ("song_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "albums" (
  "album_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each album */,
  "name" TEXT /* Album name */,
  "artist_id" INTEGER /* ID of the artist the album belongs to */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the album was released */,
  "cover_art_url" TEXT /* URL to the album cover art */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the album record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("album_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_albums_artist_id FOREIGN KEY ("artist_id") REFERENCES artists ("artist_id")
)
